approaches.title: Prefix and total-sum running differences
approaches.summary: Computes the sum on each side of every element and takes the absolute difference. Revision 1 builds left and right prefix-sum arrays explicitly; revision 2 uses

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Builds left and right prefix-sum arrays with iterator scans, then zips them to compute absolute differences.
Replaces the extra prefix-sum arrays with one total-sum pass and a running left sum, reducing auxiliary allocations.
